name: Imaginary Friend: Descartes
description: A lovely ornament modeled after Prune's imaginary friend Descartes.\nLike Prune herself, Descartes possesses a wisdom and depth far beyond that of other dogs his age. Prune knows that he may not fit most people's idea of "cute." But so what? To her, he is the cutest, closest companion she could ever ask for!\n"Real or imaginary, it's nice to grow up with friends by your side."
